sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112067" key="foci/xeilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοξίχειλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">narrowing towards the lip, narrower at the brim than below,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κύλιξ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
